pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — 12 consecutive quiet polls. No substantive changes detected on dome site. April 5-9 reset window predictions expiring April 9 — watch for post-window outcome claims.
pipeline_status.analyst: Mode 3 (globe fingerprint hunt): WIN-038 reviewed (38/67 fingerprints complete). No pending expansions. All 9 assigned-analyst issues tracked.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: Cycle 2, Phase 1: WIN-047 reviewed (47/67 WINs in cycle). All c2 reviews through WIN-046 have 0 holes confirmed — fixes from prior cycles are holding.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes. 12 consecutive quiet polls. April 5-9 reset window predictions still listed; watch for post-April-9 outcome claims.

integrity_check.notes: All checks pass. 2 ScienceDirect 403s (bot-blocking, not broken links). ISS-454 (SECTIONS_AVAILABLE circular dependency) means sections.json content is NOT visible in current published HTML despite passing tests — see critical issue below.

internal_issues.description: SECTIONS.JSON NOT INJECTED INTO HTML: generate-html.js SECTIONS_AVAILABLE flag starts false and is only set true inside loadSectionsCache(), but line 1777 checks SECTIONS_AVAILABLE before ever calling loadSectionsCache(). getSection() is only defined but never called before line 1777. Result: ALL sections.json patches (EXP-001 through EXP-017) are silently ignored in published HTML. Fix: change line 1777 from 'if (SECTIONS_AVAILABLE) { const sections = loadSectionsCache();' to 'const sections = loadSectionsCache(); if (sections) {'. ONE LINE CHANGE. Human action required immediately.

suggested_patch.note: CANNOT self-apply (infrastructure file). Must be applied by human. This is blocking all sections.json improvements.

internal_issues.description: THREE IDENTICAL DUPLICATE PARAGRAPHS in WIN-047 detail_evidence. Copy-paste artifact severely undermined credibility.
internal_issues.fix: Self-applied patch: removed duplicates, restructured with ontology primary, added Hubble tension paragraph. 2028 tests pass.

internal_issues.description: Hubble tension not addressed. Dome invokes 'low-z deviations' but we never acknowledged the genuine tension nor refuted the inference.
internal_issues.fix: Added paragraph: acknowledges H0 tension is real (5sigma, SH0ES 73.04 vs Planck 67.4), states both use standard physics, dome predicts neither value, dome offers no resolution mechanism.

internal_issues.description: Extragalactic ontology buried as secondary point; should be primary objection.
internal_issues.fix: Restructured: 'The most fundamental obstacle is ontological: the dome's firmament extends to ~9,086 km, yet galaxies are observed at millions of light-years.'

internal_issues.description: WIN-058 verdict mismatch: classified Misleading but logic fits Not Demonstrated.
internal_issues.fix: WIN-058 verdict already confirmed as 'Not Demonstrated' in data/wins.json. Issue was already resolved in a prior run.

recommended_actions.action: HUMAN REQUIRED: Fix ISS-454 (generate-html.js SECTIONS_AVAILABLE circular dependency). ONE LINE: change line 1777 from 'if (SECTIONS_AVAILABLE) { const sections = loadSectionsCache();' to 'const sections = loadSectionsCache(); if (sections) {'. This is blocking ALL sections.json improvements from appearing in published HTML.

HUMAN REQUIRED: Address DOCX issues cluster (ISS-422, ISS-427, ISS-432, ISS-440, ISS-383, ISS-414) — sections 5.14-5.16 missing from DOCX, Gaia kill-shot missing from DOCX, hardcoded Self-Contradicted count, cross-reference errors. These require build-doc-v4.js edits.

Watch for dome site changes on April 9 (reset window expiry) — poller should flag any outcome claims for analyst review.
